description: Update all third-party package dependencies in the root monorepo and platform/* packages to their latest versions. Skips ESLint 9→10 major bump (plugins not yet compatible) and @types/node 22→25 major bump (per user request). Includes major bumps for esbuild 0.24→0.27, glob 11→13, tailwind-merge 2→3, and minor/patch bumps for all other dependencies.

userStories.title: Update root devDependencies (non-breaking)
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want all root devDependencies updated to their latest compatible versions so that the project uses the most recent bug fixes and improvements.
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json devDependencies updated: @eslint/eslintrc ^3.3.3→^3.3.4, @tailwindcss/cli ^4.1.18→^4.2.1, @types/chrome ^0.1.36→^0.1.37, @typescript-eslint/parser ^8.56.0→^8.56.1, knip ^5.83.1→^5.85.0, tailwindcss ^4.1.18→^4.2.1, tsx ^4.19.2→^4.21.0, typescript-eslint ^8.56.0→^8.56.1
ESLint major version (9→10) is NOT bumped — left at ^9.39.2
@eslint/js is NOT bumped to 10.x — left at ^9.39.2
@types/node is NOT bumped to 25.x — left at ^22.15.0
userStories.notes: Edit /package.json devDependencies section. Only update the versions listed in the acceptance criteria. Do NOT bump eslint, @eslint/js, or @types/node to their next major versions — their ecosystem is not ready. After editing, run `npm install` to update the lockfile, then run the verification suite. If any dependency causes a build or type error, investigate and fix the consuming code.

userStories.title: Update glob to v13 (major bump)
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want glob updated from ^11 to ^13 so that the project uses the latest version with improved performance and features.
acceptanceCriteria: All code using the glob package still works correctly with the new API
userStories.notes: This is a major version bump (11→13). The glob package is used in root-level scripts and build tooling. After bumping the version in /package.json and running `npm install`, search the codebase for all glob imports (`import ... from 'glob'` or `require('glob')`) and verify the API usage is still compatible. Check the glob changelog for breaking changes between v11 and v13. Common breaking changes include: changed default options, removed deprecated methods, or changed return types. Fix any breaking API usage.

userStories.title: Update esbuild to 0.27 (major bump) in browser-extension and plugin-tools
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want esbuild updated from ^0.24 to ^0.27 so that the build tooling uses the latest esbuild with improved bundling capabilities.
userStories.notes: esbuild 0.24→0.27 is a major version bump. Edit platform/browser-extension/package.json and platform/plugin-tools/package.json. After bumping, run `npm install` and then `npm run build`. If the build fails, check esbuild's changelog for breaking changes. Common breaking changes include: changes to the JS API, changes to output format defaults, or removed/renamed options. Both packages use esbuild for bundling — check their build scripts (look for esbuild usage in build-*.ts files or package.json scripts) and fix any incompatible API calls.

userStories.title: Update tailwind-merge to v3 in browser-extension (major bump)
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want tailwind-merge updated from ^2.5.3 to ^3.5.0 in the browser extension to match the docs site (already on v3) and use the latest API.
acceptanceCriteria: All tailwind-merge usage in browser-extension code works with v3 API
userStories.notes: tailwind-merge v3 is a major version bump. The docs site already uses ^3.5.0 so this aligns the browser-extension. Edit platform/browser-extension/package.json. The main breaking change in tailwind-merge v3 is that it added built-in support for Tailwind CSS v4 class groups and may have changed some merge behavior. Search for `twMerge` or `import.*tailwind-merge` in platform/browser-extension/src/ to find all usage sites. The typical usage pattern `twMerge(...)` or `cn(...)` helper should still work, but verify class merging behavior hasn't changed in unexpected ways. Run `npm install && npm run build` to verify.

userStories.title: Update MCP server and browser-extension minor/patch deps
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want all remaining platform package dependencies updated to their latest minor/patch versions for bug fixes and improvements.
userStories.notes: These are all minor/patch version bumps and should be safe. Edit platform/mcp-server/package.json, platform/browser-extension/package.json, and platform/plugin-sdk/package.json with the version bumps listed in acceptance criteria. Run `npm install && npm run build` to verify. The @modelcontextprotocol/sdk bump (1.26→1.27) may introduce new features but should be backward compatible. The Radix UI bumps are minor versions that may include new component features. The Storybook bumps are patch versions. If any type errors appear after updating, fix them.
